name: GBT27930IL_SetDelayForStateTransition
title: GBT27930IL_SetDelayForStateTransition
description: Defines delay for a state transition.

parameters.type: Stop sending of CHM and start sending of CRM (BMS is not recognized)
Stop sending of CRM (BMS is not recognized) and start sending of CRM (BMS is recognized)
parameters.description: Stop sending of BHM and start sending of BRM

parameters.type: Stop sending of CRM (BMS is recognized) and start sending of CML
parameters.description: Stop sending of BRM and start sending of BCP

parameters.type: Stop sending of CML and start sending of CRO (Not ready for charging)
parameters.description: Stop sending of BCP and start sending of BRO (Not ready for charging)

parameters.type: Stop sending of CRO (Not ready for charging) and start sending of CRO (Ready for charging)
parameters.description: Stop sending of BRO (Not ready for charging) and start sending of BRO (Ready for charging)

parameters.type: Stop sending of CRO (Ready for charging) and start sending of CCS
parameters.description: Stop sending of BRO (Ready for charging) and start sending of BCL and BCS

parameters.type: Stop sending of CCS and start sending of CST.
parameters.description: In addition to sending BCL and BCS, start sending BSM. If configured, BMV and BMT are also sent.

parameters.type: Stop sending of CST and start sending of CSD
parameters.description: Stop sending of BCL, BCS and BSM and start sending of BST

parameters.type: Stop sending of CSD, end of charging
parameters.description: Stop sending of BST and start sending of BSD
Stop sending of BSD, end of charging
